title: leucanthemum delarbrei subsp. delarbrei
intro: Leucanthemum delarbrei subsp. delarbrei, commonly known as the Pyrenean Ox-eye Daisy, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
